children.name: p
children.textContent: You're waiting for your coffee at Café Volta when you notice a sleek black briefcase under the adjacent table — completely abandoned. The person sitting there left in a rush two minutes ago. The barista hasn't noticed. The briefcase has a small red LED blinking near the latch.

children.name: text
children.textContent: Open it discreetly under the table
